description: PCMTec capture sink - single ECU at $7E0/$7E8 with FordCapturePersona. Mode 09 PID 02/04 return canned VIN+CalID. Service $23 ReadMemoryByAddress serves from the HAEE4UY bin at flashBinPath. Every other request is logged to %LOCALAPPDATA%\GmEcuSimulator\logs\ford-capture\pcmtec_capture_*.log and replied to with NRC $7F SID $11.
